name: error-fixer-loop
description: Recursive error-fix loop that turns every bash/test/build failure into persistent harness improvement. Protocol: detect → root-cause → minimal fix → test → lint/typecheck → persist rule (SKILL.md / AGENTS.md / docs/rules) → audit with evidence. Cross-harness hooks (Claude Code PostToolUse + OpenCode tool.execute.after) inject the loop automatically when a build/test error pattern is matched.
